bug: BUG-001 slow time-to-content (audit: ~2.7s blank before content)
environment: dev (Vite unbundled — prod build is faster)
fixes: client/index.html: inline early-fetch script starts /api/awesome-list before bundle parse (window.__awesomeListEarlyFetch)
client/src/lib/static-data.ts: fetchStaticAwesomeList consumes the early promise one-shot, falls back to normal retry path on failure
fixed-prior: og-middleware injects fully-styled SSR content into #root for every route, so first paint shows real content
gate: 5 warm loads content visible < 1500ms — PASS (all FCP <= 408ms; SSR content is the painted content)

earlyFetchProof.note: single request started ~3.3s before DCL on a cold dev load; no duplicate fetch after React mounts
